translation_notes: Signal describes a dynamic exit mechanism based on SMA crossback. SMA period was not specified in original text ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]), so sma_20 was selected as a reasonable default for trend-following exits. The rule triggers exits when price crosses back through the SMA in the opposite direction: exit long positions when price drops to/below SMA, exit short positions when price rises to/above SMA. No entry conditions are defined in the original signal—this is purely an exit rule that applies to existing positions.
